questions.question: How much should this fix wave cover? (Full tradeoffs are in my message above — the picker won't show these descriptions, which is the bug we're capturing.)

options.label: Full fix: descriptions + ordering + first-render robustness
options.description: PR-1 (decouple the context-message source from the strict picker validator — the descriptions fix) + PR-2 (queue.join ordering barrier on the pane path so the summary lands before the picker) + PR-3 (source-rank dedup supersession / side-file upgrade so a first render that fell back to form self-heals when the rich source appears). Codex P1: PR-3 is correctness, not optional. PR-3 touches a locked dedup test (test_interactive_ui_context_dedup_crash.py:232) so it needs your sign-off. Recommended.

options.label: Descriptions + ordering only (defer the first-render backstop)
options.description: PR-1 + PR-2. Fixes both bugs your screenshot shows. Defers PR-3, so first renders that hit a session-map race / hook lag / missing side file stay degraded for that AUQ with no self-heal. Smaller; does not touch the locked test.

options.label: Descriptions only (defer ordering too)
options.description: PR-1 alone. Smallest scope. Leaves the 'picker arrives before the summary' ordering bug (the one in your Maintenance-thread screenshot) unfixed for a later wave.
